overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a spacesuited character exploring a rocky moon surface. The character walks beneath a large spacecraft with red accent lighting before continuing across the barren, mountainous alien terrain illuminated by a bright star in the dark sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky moon surface beneath a large spacecraft

events.description: character walks out from under the spacecraft into open terrain

agents.ego_description: walking steadily forward across the rocky surface beneath the hovering spacecraft

entered.detail: large spacecraft with red accent lights hovering overhead
gray rocky ground with uneven texture and scattered stones
bright star or sun providing illumination in the dark sky
dark rocky mountain slope rising on the left side
large rock formation on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks beneath a large spacecraft hovering over a rocky moon surface. The scene is dimly lit with mixed lighting from the bright star above and red lights from the spacecraft. The terrain is barren and gray, with mountain slopes visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountainous terrain on alien moon

events.description: spacecraft exits view as character enters open mountain terrain
distant mountain peak becomes visible on the right horizon

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk steadily across the barren rocky landscape, approaching the mountain ridge

entered.detail: light-colored mountain peak visible in the far distance on the right

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking across the open rocky terrain after leaving the spacecraft behind. The landscape is wide open with full sky visibility, illuminated by the bright star. A distant mountain peak becomes visible on the right as the character approaches the left mountain ridge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the sheltered shadow of a massive vessel into the vast, exposed expanse of a lunar wilderness. It begins with the character walking beneath a hovering spacecraft, where the barren gray terrain is bathed in a mix of dim starlight and artificial red accent lighting. As the character moves forward and leaves the spacecraft behind, the oppressive structure recedes to reveal a wide-open landscape under the full visibility of a dark sky. The scene then expands across the rocky surface, shifting from the confined space of the ship to a panoramic view where a distant mountain peak emerges on the right. Finally, the camera tracks the character's progress across the desolate plains as they approach a looming mountain ridge under the glow of a bright star.
